message.content:
You are auditing the AstroLab monorepo at C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\ for infinite loop risks in React code. This is a READ-ONLY audit — do NOT modify any files.

Perform these checks:

**D1. Scan ALL useEffect in web and mobile:**
Search apps/web/src/ and apps/mobile/src/ for all useEffect usage. For each:
1. Check dependency arrays are present and complete
2. Check no object/array deps that would be recreated each render
3. Check cleanup functions exist where needed (subscriptions, timers, event listeners)

**D2. Identify dangerous patterns:**
Look for:
- Objects/arrays created inline in dependency arrays
- State updates inside useEffect without proper conditions
- Fetch calls that update a dependency of the same useEffect
- Recursive state updates (A updates B which updates A)

**D3. Scan API calls in useEffect:**
Find all supabase calls and fetch() calls inside useEffect. Verify:
- Each has an abort controller or isMounted flag
- No call triggers a state update that would re-trigger the effect

**D4. Check state cycles in contexts:**
Read these files carefully:
- apps/web/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx (or similar)
- apps/web/src/contexts/PushContext.tsx
- apps/mobile/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx
- apps/mobile/src/contexts/PushContext.tsx
Look for circular listener patterns.

**D5. Scan setInterval/setTimeout:**
Search for all setInterval and setTimeout in apps/web/src/ and apps/mobile/src/. Verify each has cleanup.

Report format:
```
## Phase D — Infinite Loop Audit Results

### D1. useEffect Count & Issues
- Total useEffect found: X
- Issues found: [list with file:line and description]

### D2. Dangerous Patterns
- [List each dangerous pattern found with file:line]

### D3. API Calls Without Cleanup
- [List each unprotected API call]

### D4. State Cycles
- [Any circular state patterns found]

### D5. Timer Cleanup
- [Any timers without cleanup]

### Required Fixes:
[Specific fixes needed with file paths and code changes]
```

content.text:
## Phase D -- Infinite Loop Audit Results

### D1. useEffect Count & Issues

**Total useEffect found: 38** (28 in web, 10 in mobile)

#### Web app (`apps/web/src/`) -- 28 useEffect hooks:

| # | File | Line | Deps | Cleanup | Issue? |
|---|------|------|------|---------|--------|
| 1 | `contexts/AuthContext.tsx` | 59 | `[fetchProfile]` | Yes (subscription.unsubscribe) | OK |
| 2 | `contexts/PushContext.tsx` | 52 | `[isAuthenticated, user, isSupported]` | No | **ISSUE: `user` is object dep** |
| 3 | `contexts/PushContext.tsx` | 91 | `[user]` | Yes (removeEventListener) | **ISSUE: `user` is object dep** |
| 4 | `hooks/useCounterQR.ts` | 19 | `[user]` | No | **ISSUE: `user` is object dep, no isMounted** |
| 5 | `hooks/useMerchantCampaigns.ts` | 78 | `[fetchCampaigns]` | No | OK (stable useCallback) |
| 6 | `hooks/useCampaignDetail.ts` | 160 | `[fetchDetail]` | No | OK (stable useCallback) |
| 7 | `hooks/useLoyaltyCards.ts` | 83 | `[fetchCards]` | No | OK (stable useCallback) |
| 8 | `hooks/useBilling.ts` | 77 | `[fetchBilling]` | No | OK (stable useCallback) |
| 9 | `hooks/useCustomerStats.ts` | 26 | `[user]` | No | **ISSUE: `user` is object dep, no isMounted** |
| 10 | `hooks/useAISuggestions.ts` | 45 | `[fetchSuggestions]` | No | OK (stable useCallback) |
| 11 | `hooks/useCustomerOffers.ts` | 25 | `[user]` | No | **ISSUE: `user` is object dep, no isMounted** |
| 12 | `hooks/useWorkflowLogs.ts` | 53 | `[fetchLogs]` | No | OK (stable useCallback) |
| 13 | `hooks/useWorkflowLogs.ts` | 67 | `[profile]` | No | **ISSUE: `profile` is object dep, no isMounted** |
| 14 | `hooks/useMerchantStats.ts` | 31 | `[user]` | No | **ISSUE: `user` is object dep, no isMounted** |
| 15 | `hooks/useMerchantRewards.ts` | 61 | `[fetchRewards]` | No | OK (stable useCallback) |
| 16 | `hooks/useScanHistory.ts` | 93 | `[fetchScans]` | No | OK (stable useCallback) |
| 17 | `hooks/usePlanLimits.ts` | 25 | `[profile]` | No | **ISSUE: `profile` is object dep, no isMounted** |
| 18 | `hooks/useRewards.ts` | 27 | `[merchantId, currentPoints, currentStamps]` | No | OK (all primitives), but no isMounted |
| 19 | `hooks/useMerchantProfile.ts` | 43 | `[fetchMerchant]` | No | OK (stable useCallback) |
| 20 | `hooks/useNotificationPreferences.ts` | 20 | `[user]` | No | **ISSUE: `user` is object dep, no isMounted** |
| 21 | `hooks/useMerchantClients.ts` | 126 | `[fetchClients]` | No | OK (stable useCallback) |
| 22 | `hooks/useMerchantClients.ts` | 131 | `[search]` | No | OK (string primitive) |
| 23 | `hooks/useMerchantClientDetail.ts` | 38 | `[user, customerId]` | No | **ISSUE: `user` is object dep, no isMounted** |
| 24 | `hooks/useMerchantChartData.ts` | 21 | `[user]` | No | **ISSUE: `user` is object dep, no isMounted** |
| 25 | `components/merchant/TrialBanner.tsx` | 14 | `[]` | No | OK (mount only) |
| 26 | `components/qr/QRScanner.tsx` | 51 | `[]` | Yes (scanner.stop) | OK |
| 27 | `components/ui/Modal.tsx` | 20 | `[isOpen, onClose]` | Yes (removeEventListener) | OK |
| 28 | `pages/merchant/CheckoutSuccess.tsx` | 15 | `[countdown, navigate]` | Yes (clearTimeout) | OK |
| 29 | `pages/merchant/CampaignEdit.tsx` | 46 | `[profile, campaignId]` | No | **ISSUE: `profile` is object dep, no isMounted** |
| 30 | `components/ui/SearchInput.tsx` | 19 | `[value]` | No | OK (string primitive sync) |
| 31 | `pages/campaign/CampaignRedirect.tsx` | 22 | `[campaignId, isAuthenticated, authLoading, profile, navigate]` | No | **ISSUE: `profile` is object dep** |
| 32 | `pages/scan/ScanResult.tsx` | 20 | `[token, isAuthenticated, authLoading, navigate, subscribeToMerchant]` | No | **LOW: `subscribeToMerchant` may cause re-trigger if not stable** |
| 33 | `pages/scan/OfferPage.tsx` | 24 | `[token]` | No | OK (string primitive), but no isMounted |
| 34 | `components/campaign/AudienceSelector.tsx` | 55 | `[selected, getCount, counts]` | No | **ISSUE: `counts` is object dep, potential loop** |
| 35 | `pages/customer/CustomerCardDetail.tsx` | 28 | `[cardId, user]` | No | **ISSUE: `user` is object dep** |
| 36 | `pages/merchant/QRCodeManagement.tsx` | 29 | `[user]` | No | **ISSUE: `user` is object dep, no isMounted** |
| 37 | `pages/customer/CustomerHistory.tsx` | 47 | `[typeFilter, periodFilter, setScanPage]` | No | OK (primitives + stable setter) |

#### Mobile app (`apps/mobile/src/`) -- 10 useEffect hooks:

| # | File | Line | Deps | Cleanup | Issue? |
|---|------|------|------|---------|--------|
| 1 | `contexts/AuthContext.tsx` | 39 | `[fetchProfile]` | Yes (subscription.unsubscribe) | OK |
| 2 | `contexts/PushContext.tsx` | 22 | `[]` | No | OK (mount only) |
| 3 | `contexts/PushContext.tsx` | 26 | `[profile]` | Yes (clearTimeout) | **ISSUE: `profile` is object dep** |
| 4 | `hooks/useBrightness.ts` | 7 | `[shouldMaximize]` | Yes (restore brightness) | OK |
| 5 | `hooks/useCachedQuery.ts` | 50 | `[fetchData]` | No | **ISSUE: deps spread `[cacheKey, ...deps]` could be unstable** |
| 6 | `components/cards/CircularProgress.tsx` | 32 | `[progress]` | No | OK (number primitive) |
| 7 | `components/scanner/ScanResult.tsx` | 35 | `[]` | Yes (clearTimeout) | OK |
| 8 | `components/ui/Skeleton.tsx` | 26 | `[]` | No | OK (mount only, animation) |
| 9 | `components/ui/OfflineBanner.tsx` | 9 | `[]` | Yes (unsubscribe) | OK |
| 10 | `components/scanner/ScanOverlay.tsx` | 20 | `[]` | No | OK (mount only, animation) |

---

### D2. Dangerous Patterns

**DP-1: CRITICAL -- `user` object in dependency arrays (11 occurrences in web)**

The Supabase `User` object is a new reference on every auth state change / session refresh. While in practice Supabase often returns the same object reference when nothing changes, this is not guaranteed. The following hooks use `user` (an object) as a dependency:

- `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\contexts\PushContext.tsx:52` -- `[isAuthenticated, user, isSupported]`
- `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\contexts\PushContext.tsx:91` -- `[user]`
- `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useCounterQR.ts:19` -- `[user]`
- `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useCustomerStats.ts:26` -- `[user]`
- `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useCustomerOffers.ts:25` -- `[user]`
- `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useMerchantStats.ts:31` -- `[user]`
- `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useNotificationPreferences.ts:20` -- `[user]`
- `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useMerchantClientDetail.ts:38` -- `[user, customerId]`
- `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useMerchantChartData.ts:21` -- `[user]`
- `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\pages\customer\CustomerCardDetail.tsx:28` -- `[cardId, user]`
- `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\pages\merchant\QRCodeManagement.tsx:29` -- `[user]`

**Fix:** Replace `user` with `user?.id` in all these dependency arrays. The `id` is a string primitive and will not cause unnecessary re-runs.

**DP-2: CRITICAL -- `profile` object in dependency arrays (5 occurrences in web, 1 in mobile)**

Same issue with the `Profile` object:

- `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useWorkflowLogs.ts:67` -- `[profile]`
- `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\usePlanLimits.ts:25` -- `[profile]`
- `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\pages\merchant\CampaignEdit.tsx:46` -- `[profile, campaignId]`
- `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\pages\campaign\CampaignRedirect.tsx:22` -- `[..., profile, ...]`
- `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\pages\scan\ScanResult.tsx:20` -- (via `subscribeToMerchant` dep which depends on `user`)
- `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\src\contexts\PushContext.tsx:26` -- `[profile]`

**Fix:** Replace `profile` with `profile?.id` in all dependency arrays.

**DP-3: MEDIUM -- `counts` object in dependency array of AudienceSelector**

- `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\components\campaign\AudienceSelector.tsx:55` -- `[selected, getCount, counts]`

The `counts` state is an object (`Record<string, number | null>`). Each time `setCounts` is called with a new object (line 61), it creates a new reference, which causes the useEffect to re-run. However, this is partially guarded by the `if (counts[selected] !== undefined) return;` check at line 57. This prevents an actual infinite loop, but the effect will fire an extra unnecessary time after each count fetch. The `getCount` prop (a function) is also potentially unstable if not wrapped in `useCallback` by the parent.

**DP-4: MEDIUM -- `useCachedQuery` spread deps**

- `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\src\hooks\useCachedQuery.ts:48` -- `useCallback(async () => {...}, [cacheKey, ...deps])`

The `deps` parameter is passed as `unknown[] = []`. If callers pass inline arrays or objects as deps, they will create new references each render, causing `fetchData` to be recreated each render, which will re-trigger the `useEffect` at line 50. This is a potential infinite loop depending on how callers use this hook.

**DP-5: LOW -- `new Date()` in function bodies called by effects**

Several hooks call `new Date()` or `getStartOfDay()` inside their async functions (e.g., `useMerchantStats`, `useCustomerStats`, `useMerchantChartData`). These are safe since they are called inside the effect body (not in the dep array), but they mean the data changes on each fetch even if underlying data has not changed, causing unnecessary state updates.

---

### D3. API Calls Without Cleanup

**CRITICAL -- No abort controller or isMounted flag on any Supabase/fetch call inside useEffect:**

Every single async data-fetching useEffect in the web app lacks both an `AbortController` and an `isMounted` guard. This means if the component unmounts while a fetch is in-flight, it will attempt to call `setState` on an unmounted component (React warning, potential memory leak).

Affected files (ALL useEffect hooks with API calls):

1. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\contexts\PushContext.tsx:52` -- setup() has no isMounted
2. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useCounterQR.ts:19` -- fetchCounterQR() no isMounted
3. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useMerchantCampaigns.ts:78` -- via fetchCampaigns, no isMounted
4. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useCampaignDetail.ts:160` -- via fetchDetail, no isMounted
5. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useLoyaltyCards.ts:83` -- via fetchCards, no isMounted
6. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useBilling.ts:77` -- via fetchBilling, no isMounted
7. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useCustomerStats.ts:26` -- fetchStats, no isMounted
8. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useAISuggestions.ts:45` -- via fetchSuggestions, no isMounted
9. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useCustomerOffers.ts:25` -- fetchOffers, no isMounted
10. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useWorkflowLogs.ts:53` -- via fetchLogs, no isMounted
11. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useWorkflowLogs.ts:67` -- loadStats, no isMounted
12. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useMerchantStats.ts:31` -- fetchStats, no isMounted
13. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useMerchantRewards.ts:61` -- via fetchRewards, no isMounted
14. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useScanHistory.ts:93` -- via fetchScans, no isMounted
15. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\usePlanLimits.ts:25` -- fetchLimits, no isMounted
16. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useRewards.ts:27` -- fetchRewards, no isMounted
17. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useMerchantProfile.ts:43` -- via fetchMerchant, no isMounted
18. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useNotificationPreferences.ts:20` -- fetchPreferences, no isMounted
19. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useMerchantClients.ts:126` -- via fetchClients, no isMounted
20. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useMerchantClientDetail.ts:38` -- fetchDetail, no isMounted
21. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\hooks\useMerchantChartData.ts:21` -- fetchChartData, no isMounted
22. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\pages\customer\CustomerCardDetail.tsx:28` -- fetchCard, no isMounted
23. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\pages\merchant\QRCodeManagement.tsx:29` -- loadCampaignQRs, no isMounted
24. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\pages\merchant\CampaignEdit.tsx:46` -- load, no isMounted
25. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\pages\campaign\CampaignRedirect.tsx:22` -- findQRCode, no isMounted
26. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\pages\scan\ScanResult.tsx:20` -- doScan, no isMounted
27. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\pages\scan\OfferPage.tsx:24` -- loadOffer, no isMounted
28. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\components\campaign\AudienceSelector.tsx:55` -- loadCount, no isMounted

**Positive exception in mobile:**
- `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\src\hooks\useBrightness.ts:7` -- correctly uses a `mounted` flag and cleanup.

**Note:** None of these API call effects have the pattern "fetch -> update dep -> re-fetch" which would cause a true infinite loop. The state updates (`setStats`, `setCards`, etc.) do not modify the dependency arrays, so **no API call actively triggers its own re-execution**. The risk here is memory leaks from setState-after-unmount, not infinite loops.

---

### D4. State Cycles in Contexts

**Web AuthContext** (`C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\contexts\AuthContext.tsx`):
- `useEffect` at line 59 depends on `[fetchProfile]`, which is a stable `useCallback` with `[]` deps. 
- `onAuthStateChange` listener properly cleaned up with `subscription.unsubscribe()`.
- No circular state pattern. **OK.**

**Web PushContext** (`C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\contexts\PushContext.tsx`):
- Effect at line 52 depends on `[isAuthenticated, user, isSupported]`. The `user` object reference could theoretically trigger re-runs if Supabase refreshes the session and creates a new User object, but this would not create an infinite loop (no state update feeds back into the dep array).
- Effect at line 91 depends on `[user]` and has proper cleanup (removeEventListener).
- No circular pattern between AuthContext and PushContext. PushContext reads from AuthContext (via `useAuth()`) but does not update auth state. **OK, but user dep should be user?.id.**

**Mobile AuthContext** (`C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\src\contexts\AuthContext.tsx`):
- Same pattern as web. Stable `fetchProfile` useCallback with `[]` deps.
- `onAuthStateChange` properly cleaned up. 
- No circular state. **OK.**

**Mobile PushContext** (`C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\src\contexts\PushContext.tsx`):
- Effect at line 22 is `[]` (mount only). OK.
- Effect at line 26 depends on `[profile]`. The `profile` object may change reference when AuthContext refetches it, but the effect at line 26 only runs `registerPlayer` which sets `playerId` and `pushEnabled` -- these do not feed back into `profile`. Timer is properly cleaned up.
- No circular pattern. **OK, but profile dep should be profile?.id.**

**Cross-context analysis**: There are no circular listener patterns. AuthContext does not depend on PushContext. PushContext depends on AuthContext (one-way). No other contexts exist.

---

### D5. Timer Cleanup

**Web app:**

| File | Line | Timer Type | Has Cleanup? | Issue? |
|------|------|-----------|--------------|--------|
| `components/ui/Toast.tsx` | 31 | `setTimeout` | **NO** | **ISSUE: setTimeout in callback, no clearTimeout on unmount** |
| `components/ui/SearchInput.tsx` | 26 | `setTimeout` | Partially (clearTimeout on next call via ref) | **ISSUE: no cleanup on unmount -- timerRef.current is not cleared in a cleanup function** |
| `pages/merchant/CheckoutSuccess.tsx` | 21 | `setTimeout` | **YES** (return () => clearTimeout(timer)) | OK |

**Mobile app:**

| File | Line | Timer Type | Has Cleanup? | Issue? |
|------|------|-----------|--------------|--------|
| `contexts/PushContext.tsx` | 51 | `setTimeout` | **YES** (return () => clearTimeout(timer)) | OK |
| `hooks/useQRScanner.ts` | 102 | `setTimeout` | **NO** | **ISSUE: setTimeout inside callback, no cleanup on unmount** |
| `components/scanner/ScanResult.tsx` | 39 | `setTimeout` | **YES** (return () => clearTimeout(timer)) | OK |

---

### Required Fixes:

**FIX 1 -- Replace object deps with primitive IDs (PRIORITY: HIGH)**

In all hooks using `user` as a dependency, replace `user` with `user?.id`:

Affected files:
- `apps/web/src/contexts/PushContext.tsx` lines 88, 107 -- change `user` to `user?.id`
- `apps/web/src/hooks/useCounterQR.ts` line 75 -- change `[user]` to `[user?.id]`
- `apps/web/src/hooks/useCustomerStats.ts` line 125 -- change `[user]` to `[user?.id]`
- `apps/web/src/hooks/useCustomerOffers.ts` line 101 -- change `[user]` to `[user?.id]`
- `apps/web/src/hooks/useMerchantStats.ts` line 93 -- change `[user]` to `[user?.id]`
- `apps/web/src/hooks/useNotificationPreferences.ts` line 71 -- change `[user]` to `[user?.id]`
- `apps/web/src/hooks/useMerchantClientDetail.ts` line 114 -- change `[user, customerId]` to `[user?.id, customerId]`
- `apps/web/src/hooks/useMerchantChartData.ts` line 101 -- change `[user]` to `[user?.id]`
- `apps/web/src/pages/customer/CustomerCardDetail.tsx` line 43 -- change `[cardId, user]` to `[cardId, user?.id]`
- `apps/web/src/pages/merchant/QRCodeManagement.tsx` line 70 -- change `[user]` to `[user?.id]`

In all hooks using `profile` as a dependency, replace with `profile?.id`:

- `apps/web/src/hooks/useWorkflowLogs.ts` line 135 -- change `[profile]` to `[profile?.id]`
- `apps/web/src/hooks/usePlanLimits.ts` line 75 -- change `[profile]` to `[profile?.id]`
- `apps/web/src/pages/merchant/CampaignEdit.tsx` line 82 -- change `[profile, campaignId]` to `[profile?.id, campaignId]`
- `apps/web/src/pages/campaign/CampaignRedirect.tsx` line 86 -- change `profile` to `profile?.id` in dep array
- `apps/mobile/src/contexts/PushContext.tsx` line 53 -- change `[profile]` to `[profile?.id]`

**FIX 2 -- Add isMounted guards to all async useEffect bodies (PRIORITY: MEDIUM)**

Add the following pattern to all 28 data-fetching useEffects in web:

```typescript
useEffect(() => {
  let isMounted = true;
  
  async function fetchData() {
    // ... existing logic ...
    if (!isMounted) return; // before every setState call
    setData(result);
  }
  
  fetchData();
  return () => { isMounted = false; };
}, [deps]);
```

**FIX 3 -- Toast setTimeout cleanup (PRIORITY: LOW)**

`C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\components\ui\Toast.tsx` line 31: The `setTimeout` inside the `toast` callback is not cleaned up if the ToastProvider unmounts. Since this is a top-level provider that essentially never unmounts, this is a very low risk. However, for correctness, consider tracking timer IDs and clearing them on unmount.

**FIX 4 -- SearchInput missing cleanup (PRIORITY: LOW)**

`C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\web\src\components\ui\SearchInput.tsx`: The `timerRef` is cleared on each keystroke, but not on component unmount. Add a useEffect cleanup:

```typescript
useEffect(() => {
  return () => clearTimeout(timerRef.current);
}, []);
```

**FIX 5 -- useQRScanner setTimeout (PRIORITY: LOW)**

`C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\src\hooks\useQRScanner.ts` line 102: The `setTimeout` inside `handleBarCodeScanned` has no cleanup.
